files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons for November with 4 distinct lessons: Theology/Testimony (Miracles), Work/Business (very brief), Literature (Rock of Ages hymn analysis), and Social Service (adolescent discipline). The file also includes extensive advertisements at the end which are part of the original magazine format.
